entries.name: Shiv
entries.desc:
Attack with your off-hand, dealing 2 Physical damage, dispelling all enrage effects and applying a concentrated form of your active Non-Lethal poison.

Awards 1 combo point.

entries.name: Blind
entries.desc: Blinds the target, causing it to wander disoriented for 1 min. Damage may interrupt the effect. Limit 1.

entries.name: Cloak of Shadows
entries.desc: Provides a moment of magic immunity, instantly removing all harmful spell effects. The cloak lingers, causing you to resist harmful spells for 5 sec.

entries.name: Toxic Stiletto
entries.desc: Shiv's Energy cost is reduced by 20, its cooldown is reduced by 15 sec, and its range is increased by 3 yds.

entries.name: Fleet Footed
entries.desc: Movement speed increased by 15%.

entries.name: Gouge
entries.desc:
Gouges the eyes of an enemy target, incapacitating for 4 sec. Damage may interrupt the effect.

Must be in front of your target.

Awards 1 combo point.

entries.name: Airborne Irritant
entries.desc: Blind has 50% reduced cooldown, 70% reduced duration, and applies to all nearby enemies.

entries.name: Thrill Seeking
entries.desc: Shadowstep has 1 additional charge.

entries.name: Shadowrunner
entries.desc: While Stealth or Shadow Dance is active, you move 20% faster.

entries.name: Master Poisoner
entries.desc: Increases the non-damaging effects of your weapon poisons by 20%.

entries.name: Elusiveness
entries.desc: Evasion also reduces damage taken by 20%, and Feint also reduces non-area-of-effect damage taken by 20%.

entries.name: Cheat Death
entries.desc: Fatal attacks instead reduce you to 7% of your maximum health. For 3 sec afterward, you take 85% reduced damage. Cannot trigger more often than once per 6 min.

entries.name: Tricks of the Trade
entries.desc: Redirects all threat you cause to the targeted party or raid member, beginning with your next damaging attack within the next 30 sec and lasting 6 sec.

entries.name: Blackjack
entries.desc: Enemies have 30% reduced damage and healing for 6 sec after Blind or Sap's effect on them ends.

entries.name: Improved Wound Poison
entries.desc: Wound Poison can now stack 2 additional times.

entries.name: Nimble Fingers
entries.desc: Energy cost of Feint and Crimson Vial reduced by 10.

entries.name: Deadened Nerves
entries.desc: Physical damage taken reduced by 5%.

entries.name: Quick Fingers
entries.desc: Increases your Agility by 3%.

entries.name: Improved Sprint
entries.desc: Reduces the cooldown of Sprint by 60 sec.

entries.name: Superior Mixture
entries.desc: Crippling Poison reduces movement speed by an additional 10%.

entries.name: Evasion
entries.desc: Increases your dodge chance by 100% for 10 sec.

entries.name: Iron Stomach
entries.desc: Increases the healing you receive from Crimson Vial, healing potions, and healthstones by 25%.

entries.name: Virulent Poisons
entries.desc: Increases the damage of your weapon poisons by 10%.

entries.name: Stillshroud
entries.desc: Shroud of Concealment has 50% reduced cooldown.

entries.name: Graceful Guile
entries.desc: Feint has 1 additional charge.

entries.name: Featherfoot
entries.desc: Sprint increases movement speed by an additional 30% and has 4 sec increased duration.

entries.name: Numbing Poison
entries.desc: Coats your weapons with a Non-Lethal Poison that lasts for 1 hour. Each strike has a 30% chance of poisoning the enemy, clouding their mind and slowing their attack and casting speed by 15% for 10 sec.

entries.name: Atrophic Poison
entries.desc: Coats your weapons with a Non-Lethal Poison that lasts for 1 hour. Each strike has a 30% chance of poisoning the enemy, reducing their damage by 3.0% for 10 sec.

entries.name: Deadly Precision
entries.desc: Increases the critical strike chance of your attacks that generate combo points by 5%.

entries.name: Sanguine Vial
entries.desc: When you deal the killing blow to a target that yields experience or honor, the cooldown of Crimson Vial is reduced by 15 sec and your next use heals 5% of your health instantly.

entries.name: Deep Cuts
entries.desc: Your finishing moves deal 6% increased damage.

entries.name: Unbreakable Stride
entries.desc: Reduces the duration of movement slowing effects 30%.

entries.name: Danger Sense
entries.desc: You have a 20% chance to partially evade any damage dealt to you, reducing the damage it deals by 20%.

entries.name: Swift Slasher
entries.desc: Slice and Dice grants additional attack speed equal to 100% of your Haste.

entries.name: Improved Ambush
entries.desc: Ambush generates 1 additional combo point.

entries.name: Tight Spender
entries.desc: Energy cost of finishing moves reduced by 6%.

entries.name: Leeching Poison
entries.desc: Adds a Leeching effect to your Lethal poisons, granting you 3.0% Leech.

entries.name: Lethality
entries.desc: Critical strike chance increased by 1%. Critical strike damage bonus of your attacks that generate combo points increased by 10%.

entries.name: Recuperator
entries.desc: Slice and Dice heals you for up to 1% of your maximum health per 3 sec.

entries.name: Alacrity
entries.desc: Haste increased by 1.5%.

entries.name: Soothing Darkness
entries.desc: You are healed for 30% of your maximum health over 6 sec after activating Vanish.

entries.name: Vigor
entries.desc: Increases your maximum Energy by 50 and Energy regeneration by 5%.

entries.name: Supercharger
entries.desc:
Kingsbane supercharges 1 combo point.

Damaging finishing moves consume a supercharged combo point to function as if they spent 2 additional combo points.

entries.name: Subterfuge
entries.desc:
Abilities requiring Stealth can be used for 3 sec after Stealth breaks.

Combat benefits requiring Stealth persist for an additional 3 sec after Stealth breaks.

entries.name: Thistle Tea
entries.desc:
Restore 100 Energy.

When your Energy is reduced below 30, drink a Thistle Tea.

entries.name: Cold Blooded Killer
entries.desc: Critically striking with an attack that generates combo points increases the critical strike chance of your next finishing move by 10%.

entries.name: Echoing Reprimand
entries.desc: After consuming a supercharged combo point, your next Mutilate also strikes the target with an Echoing Reprimand dealing 40 Physical damage.

entries.name: Forced Induction
entries.desc: Increase the bonus granted when a damaging finishing move consumes a supercharged combo point by 1.

entries.name: Deeper Stratagem
entries.desc:
Gain 1 additional max combo point.

Your finishing moves that consume more than 5 combo points have increased effects, and your finishing moves deal 5% increased damage.

entries.name: Without a Trace
entries.desc: Vanish has 1 additional charge.

entries.name: Opportunity
entries.desc:
Sinister Strike has a 30% chance to hit an additional time and grant Opportunity.

 Opportunity
Your next Pistol Shot costs 50% less Energy and deals 100% increased damage.

entries.name: Hit and Run
entries.desc: Movement speed increased by 15%.

entries.name: Combat Stamina
entries.desc: Stamina increased by 5%.

entries.name: Adrenaline Rush
entries.desc: Increases your Energy regeneration rate by 75%, your maximum Energy by 50, and your attack speed by 20% for 15 sec.

entries.name: Retractable Hook
entries.desc: Reduces the cooldown of Grappling Hook by 15 sec.

entries.name: Blinding Powder
entries.desc: Reduces the cooldown of Blind by 25% and increases its range by 5 yds.

entries.name: Expert Duelist
entries.desc: Between the Eyes increases your damage dealt by an additional 2%.

entries.name: Combat Potency
entries.desc: Increases your Energy regeneration rate by 16%.

entries.name: Deadly Pursuit
entries.desc: After spending 15 combo points, if you spend no combo points for 4 sec, abilities affected by Restless Blades will cool down 200% faster for 5 sec or until you spend a combo point.

entries.name: Precision Shot
entries.desc: Between the Eyes and Pistol Shot have 10 yd increased range and deal 20% increased damage.

entries.name: Crescendo of Violence
entries.desc: Your finishing moves deal 10% increased damage.

entries.name: Deft Maneuvers
entries.desc: Blade Flurry's initial damage is increased by 100% and generates 1 combo point per target struck, but its Energy cost is increased by 30.

entries.name: Devious Stratagem
entries.desc:
Gain 1 additional max combo point.

Your finishing moves that consume more than 5 combo points have increased effects, and your finishing moves deal 5% increased damage.

entries.name: Fatal Flourish
entries.desc: Your off-hand attacks and Pistol Shots have a 25% chance to generate 8 Energy.

entries.name: Quick Draw
entries.desc: Opportunity increases the damage of Pistol Shot by an additional 20%. Each charge of Opportunity consumed by Pistol Shot generates 1 combo point.

entries.name: Ruthlessness
entries.desc: Your finishing moves have a 20% chance per combo point spent to grant a combo point.

entries.name: Blade Rush
entries.desc:
Charge to your target with your blades out, dealing 304 Physical damage to the target and 132 to all other nearby enemies. Damage reduced beyond 8 targets.

While Blade Flurry is active, damage to non-primary targets is increased by 100%.

Generates 25 Energy over 5 sec.

entries.name: Loaded Dice
entries.desc: Activating Adrenaline Rush improves the result of your next Roll the Bones by one level.

entries.name: Sleight of Hand
entries.desc: Roll the Bones has a 20% increased chance of granting more powerful results.

entries.name: Improved Between the Eyes
entries.desc: Critical strikes with Between the Eyes deal 3.0 times normal damage.

entries.name: Thief's Versatility
entries.desc: Versatility increased by 3%.

entries.name: Flickering Steel
entries.desc: Sinister Strike and Ambush deal 20% increased damage. They also generate 5 Energy when they grant you Opportunity.

entries.name: Audacity
entries.desc:
Using Pistol Shot with Opportunity has a 30% chance to make your next Ambush usable without Stealth.

Chance to trigger this effect matches the chance for Sinister Strike to grant Opportunity.

entries.name: Heavy Hitter
entries.desc: Attacks that generate combo points deal 10% increased damage.

entries.name: Improved Adrenaline Rush
entries.desc: Generate full combo points when you gain Adrenaline Rush.

entries.name: Ace Up Your Sleeve
entries.desc: Between the Eyes has a 3% chance per combo point spent to grant 4 combo points and reset its own cooldown.

entries.name: Dancing Steel
entries.desc: Blade Flurry strikes 3 additional enemies and its duration is increased by 3 sec.

entries.name: Find an Opening
entries.desc: Your chance for Sinister Strike to strike twice and grant Opportunity is increased by 10%

entries.name: Acrobatic Strikes
entries.desc: Auto-attacks increase auto-attack damage by 3% and movement speed by 1% for 3 sec, stacking up to 10 times.

entries.name: Heightened Rush
entries.desc: Adrenaline Rush's duration is increased by 4 sec.

entries.name: Menacing Rush
entries.desc: Adrenaline Rush magnifies your precision and power, increasing the damage your combo point generating abilities and finishers deal by 20%.

entries.name: Zero In
entries.desc: Your auto-attack critical strikes increase the damage and critical strike chance of your next Between the Eyes by 3%, stacking up to 20 times.

entries.name: Grand Melee
entries.desc: Blade Flurry causes your attacks to hit nearby enemies for an additional 8% of their normal damage.

entries.name: Summarily Dispatched
entries.desc: Dispatch deals 10% increased damage and costs 3 less Energy. This damage bonus is increased by 50% while your damage is enhanced by your Between the Eyes.

entries.name: Dragon-Bone Dice
entries.desc:
The bonuses granted by your Roll the Bones are stronger.

Bonuses to chance for Sinister Strike to strike twice are 5% greater.
Bonuses to Sinister Strike and Ambush damage are 5% greater.
Bonuses to Restless Blades cooldown reduction are 10% greater.
Jackpot's bonus to critical strike chance is 5% greater.

entries.name: Fan the Hammer
entries.desc:
When you gain Opportunity, gain 1 additional charge. Max 6 charges.

Pistol Shot consumes 1 additional charge of Opportunity to fire 1 additional bullet. Additional shots deal 20% reduced damage.

entries.name: Hidden Opportunity
entries.desc: Ambush has a chance to grant Opportunity. Chance to trigger this effect is 80% of the chance for Sinister Strike to grant Opportunity.

entries.name: Killing Spree
entries.desc:
Finishing move that unleashes a barrage of gunfire, striking random enemies within 8 yards for Physical damage. Number of strikes increased per combo point.

Restores 1 combo point every 0.45 sec.

   1 point  : 196 over 0.45 sec
   2 points: 295 over 0.89 sec
   3 points: 393 over 1.34 sec
   4 points: 491 over 1.78 sec
   5 points: 589 over 2.23 sec

entries.name: Keep It Rolling
entries.desc: Increase the remaining duration of your active Roll the Bones combat enhancement by 30 sec.

entries.name: Fast Action
entries.desc: The cooldown of Between the Eyes is reduced by 5 sec.

entries.name: Preparation
entries.desc: Immediately reset the cooldowns of Adrenaline Rush, Between the Eyes, Blade Flurry, Blade Rush, and Killing Spree.

entries.name: Gravedigger
entries.desc: Between the Eyes has a 45% chance to apply 2 stacks of its bonus to your damage dealt.

entries.name: Flawless Form
entries.desc: Unseen Blade and Secret Technique increase the damage of your finishing moves by 4% for 12 sec. Max 5 stacks.

entries.name: Coup de Grace
entries.desc: After 4 strikes with Unseen Blade, your next Eviscerate will be performed as a Coup de Grace, functioning as if it had consumed 5 additional combo points, and granting you 5 stacks of Flawless Form.

entries.name: Cloud Cover
entries.desc:
Activating Shadow Blades creates a cloud of smoke for 6 sec, allowing attacks from within the cloud to apply Fazed, stacking up to 2 additional times.

Effect persists for 6 sec after leaving the cloud.

entries.name: No Scruples
entries.desc: Finishing moves have 12% increased chance to critically strike Fazed targets.

entries.name: Disorienting Strikes
entries.desc: Secret Technique has 10% reduced cooldown and allows your next 2 strikes of Unseen Blade to ignore its cooldown.

entries.name: Surprising Strikes
entries.desc: Attacks that generate combo points deal 50% increased critical strike damage to Fazed targets.

entries.name: Nimble Flurry
entries.desc: Your auto-attacks, Unseen Blade, and Coup de Grace also strike up to 7 nearby enemies for 50% of normal damage while Flawless Form is active.

entries.name: Devious Distractions
entries.desc: Secret Technique applies Fazed to any targets struck.

entries.name: So Tricky
entries.desc: Tricks of the Trade's threat redirect duration is increased to 1 hour.

entries.name: Don't Be Suspicious
entries.desc:
Blind and Shroud of Concealment have 10% reduced cooldown.

Pick Pocket and Sap have 10 yd increased range.

entries.name: Thousand Cuts
entries.desc: Slice and Dice grants 10% additional attack speed and gives your auto-attacks a chance to refresh your opportunity to strike with Unseen Blade.

entries.name: Flickerstrike
entries.desc:
Taking damage from an area-of-effect attack while Feint is active or dodging while Evasion is active refreshes your opportunity to strike with Unseen Blade.

This effect may only occur once every 5 sec.

entries.name: Unseen Blade
entries.desc:
Backstab and Shadowstrike now also strike with an Unseen Blade dealing 99 damage. Targets struck are Fazed for 10 sec.

Fazed enemies take 5% more damage from you and cannot parry your attacks.

This effect may occur once every 20 sec.

entries.name: Smoke
entries.desc: You take 5% reduced damage from Fazed targets.

entries.name: Mirrors
entries.desc: Feint reduces damage taken from area-of-effect attacks by an additional 10%

entries.name: Clever Combatant
entries.desc: Shuriken Storm has 10% increased critical strike chance and now triggers Unseen Blade when available.

entries.name: Flashing Steel
entries.desc: Unseen Blade may now occur once every 15 sec and has 25% chance to strike twice.

entries.name: Hoodwink
entries.desc: Fazed increases damage taken by an additional 3%.

entries.name: Deal Fate
entries.desc: Mutilate, Ambush, and Fan of Knives generate 1 additional combo point when they trigger Seal Fate.

entries.name: Overflowing Purse
entries.desc: Envenom has a 15% chance to flip 3 Fatebound Coins.

entries.name: Destiny Defined
entries.desc: Sinister Strike has 5% increased chance to strike an additional time and grant Opportunity and your Fatebound Coins flipped have an additional 5% chance to match the same face as the last flip.

entries.name: Delivered Doom
entries.desc: Envenom deals 5% more damage when it consumes 5 or more combo points.

entries.name: Edge Case
entries.desc: Activating Deathmark flips a Fatebound Coin and causes it to land on its edge, counting as both Heads and Tails.

entries.name: Mean Streak
entries.desc: Fatebound Coins flipped by Envenom are 33% more likely to match the same face as the last flip.

entries.name: Hand of Fate
entries.desc:
Flip a Fatebound Coin each time a finishing move consumes 5 or more combo points. Heads increases the damage of your attacks by 10%, lasting 15 sec or until you flip Tails. Tails deals 59 Cosmic damage to your target.

For each time the same face is flipped in a row, Heads increases damage by an additional 2% and Tails increases its damage by 10%.

entries.name: Lucky Coin
entries.desc:
Every 7 coin flips, keep a lucky coin that bends you towards your fate for 12 sec. Your Agility is increased by 4%, the damage and bonuses of Fatebound Coins are increased by 50%, and coin flips are 15% more likely to match the same face as the last flip.

Coin flips do not count toward finding a lucky coin while you have a lucky coin.

entries.name: Rush to the Inevitable
entries.desc: Gain 5 Energy every time you flip a Fatebound Coin. Gain 15 Energy for Coins that land on their edge.

entries.name: Inexorable March
entries.desc: You cannot be slowed below 70% of normal movement speed while your Fatebound Coin flips have an active streak of at least 2 flips matching the same face.

entries.name: Death's Arrival
entries.desc: Grappling Hook may be used a second time within 3 sec with no cooldown, but its total cooldown is increased by 5 sec.

entries.name: Chosen's Revelry
entries.desc: Flipping a Fatebound Coin restores 10 health.

entries.name: Tempted Fate
entries.desc: You have a 30% chance to absorb 10% of any damage taken.

entries.name: Fate Intertwined
entries.desc: Caustic Spatter causes an additional 5% of Nature damage dealt to be dealt to affected enemies.

entries.name: Ravenholdt Mint
entries.desc: Flipping Heads increases damage by an additional 4%. Damage dealt by flipping Tails is increased by 12%.

entries.name: Sometimes Lucky
entries.desc: Critical strike chance increased by 3%.

entries.name: Controlled Chaos
entries.desc: After flipping a Fatebound Coin that ends a streak of 4 or more, flip another that matches the same face.
